issue_title: Allow urllib3 2.x for Python 3.7+ in requests dependency constraints
issue_text: This semi-real task is derived from psf/requests#6432. The current dependency configuration still pins urllib3 to <1.27, which prevents urllib3 2.x from being installed on Python 3.7+. Update the dependency constraint so urllib3 2.x is allowed while keeping the rest of the requirements intact.
success_criteria: The urllib3 dependency constraint allows urllib3 2.x, and all setup regression tests pass.

metadata.notes: 从真实 issue 提炼出的半真实可运行任务，聚焦 urllib3 上界约束修复。
